items.name: UMG Zealot Elite DAMAGED Helmet Variant
items.description:
The state of this helmet suggests it dates back to the initial failure of a certain planet, however... 
Who or what was wearing this doing there is still unknown to this very day. 

Permission from: PRISM
CREDITS: Prism, Fran, and Zealot Abyss, all I did was heavily modify and tweak the design. 


This helmet variant  is NOT intended for the public, but for UMG elites within UMG deathsquad.

items.name: Virtuoso Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🎼 Elegance in Every Note, Style in Every Step!
This flowing white coat is inspired by classical sophistication, featuring violin-shaped accents along the waist for a truly artistic touch. Its pristine design blends fashion with music, making it perfect for roleplay, concerts, or stylish avatars who want to stand out.

💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant white flowing design with musical details 🎻
Unique violin-inspired accents for a creative aesthetic
Perfect for formal roleplay, concerts, or fantasy outfits
A statement piece that combines art, music, and fashion

🔍 Keywords: coat, white, elegant, violin, music, classical, roleplay, artistic, fashion, PBR
Step onto the stage with grace and let your style play the melody!
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
